item.title: LoRA Reward Model for Sparse-Reward, Human-Aligned SoC Training
item.description:

Placeholder: describe the challenge of LLM-as-a-judge variance and sparse-reward SoC training.

Why the problem is hard

System design

Architecture diagram

Experiments
